label: Art — paintings, works on paper (SCAFFOLD — thin sources, uncalibrated; provisional/flagged only until Tier-1 + calibration land)

captureSlots.label: Front (full)
captureSlots.guidance: Whole work, square-on, even light, unframed edge visible if possible.

captureSlots.label: Signature macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the signature, monogram, or inscription.

captureSlots.label: Verso / back
captureSlots.guidance: Back of the work: labels, stamps, inscriptions, stretcher.

captureSlots.label: Detail in raking light
captureSlots.guidance: Surface texture in raking light — brushwork, craquelure, print dots.

captureSlots.label: Frame / edge
captureSlots.guidance: Edge of the support and frame rebate.

captureSlots.label: Provenance documents
captureSlots.guidance: Receipts, exhibition labels, correspondence, prior sale records.

redFlags.label: Later-added signature
redFlags.description: Signature applied later or over varnish to upgrade an unsigned work.

redFlags.label: Reproduction as original
redFlags.description: Mechanical reproduction (print dots, uniform surface) presented as an original work.

redFlags.label: Attribution upgrade
redFlags.description: Workshop, school, or follower piece presented as an autograph work.

redFlags.label: Over-cleaned / heavily restored
redFlags.description: Extensive overpaint or abrasion concealed by varnish.

redFlags.label: Relined / altered support
redFlags.description: Relining or trimming that removed original evidence (labels, edges, inscriptions).
